zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Bohun於1350年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福時，她的父親William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton38歲，母親Elizabeth Badlesmere37歲。她於1359年9月28日與Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年4月3日在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾享年35歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Bohun于1350年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福时，她的父亲William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton38岁，母亲Elizabeth Badlesmere37岁。她于1359年9月28日与Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年4月3日在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾享年35岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (Behúň) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Behún): nickname from Slovak behúň (Rusyn bihun) ‘fast runner’.
Irish: from Ó Beachain or Ó Beathain, see Behan . This form of the surname is almost extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Behan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Conan, Aileen.
Irish (southern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beachain ‘descendant of Beachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of beach ‘bee’.
Irish (southern): perhaps from Ó Beathain ‘descendant of Beathán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare Bean 5 and McBeth .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Bohun was born in 1350, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Badlesmere, was 37. She married Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel on 28 September 1359. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 3 April 1385, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Bohun est née en 1350, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Badlesmere, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel le 28 septembre 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 avril 1385, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Bohun 1350 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Badlesmere 37. Sie hat am 28. September 1359 Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. April 1385 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Bohun è nata il nel 1350 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Badlesmere, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel il 28 settembre 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1385, nel Arundel, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Bohunが1350年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northamptonは38歳，母Elizabeth Badlesmereは37歳であった。1359年9月28日にSir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年4月3日にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルで35歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Bohun(이)가 1350년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Badlesmere(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1359년 9월 28일 Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 4월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Bohun nasceu em 1350, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Badlesmere, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel em 28 de setembro de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de abril de 1385, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Bohun родилась в 1350 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Badlesmere, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel 28 сентября 1359 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 апреля 1385 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel el 28 de septiembre de 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1385, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
